# foldapp Operator CLI — progress ledger

Branch: feature/foldapp-cli  (base: main @ bb0e0cd; plan/spec commits 14b944c, 9c505b5)
Plan: docs/superpowers/plans/2026-07-01-foldapp-cli.md  (17 tasks)
Spec: docs/superpowers/specs/2026-07-01-foldapp-cli-design.md
Execution: subagent-driven-development (fresh implementer + task review per task).

Env notes: unit tests run without Postgres; the one integration test (Task 7
maintenance toggle) auto-skips when Postgres is down (conftest). Fast iteration:
`uv run pytest -m "not integration"`. Gate: `uv run ruff check . && uv run ruff format --check .`.

## Tasks
Task 1: complete (commit 3a90788, review ✅ clean/sonnet) — foldapp package scaffold + shell.run/CommandResult/CommandError + Typer cli.app/main + console script (foldapp only; old fold-admin/fold-scheduler entries removed) + rich dep. 5/5 foldapp, 177/177 suite, ruff clean.
Task 2: complete (commit e49a073, review ✅ clean/sonnet) — context.py FoldappPaths + resolve_paths (env/home/app_dir/user overrides; FOLDAPP_APP_DIR/FOLDAPP_STATE_DIR). 3 tests, 180 suite, ruff clean.
Task 3: complete (commit b558089, review ✅ clean/sonnet) — state.py DeployState + read_state/write_state (JSON, parent-dir create, missing→None). 2 tests, 182 suite. Reviewer isolated the suite's "2 warnings" to pre-existing code, NOT this diff.
Task 4: complete (commits 8e70f17..b048430, review ✅/sonnet) — envfile.py generate_secret_key/scaffold_env(never-overwrite,0o600)/redact_settings. FIX applied (Important, was plan-mandated): DB-URL password redaction now uses urllib.parse (was regex leaking passwords containing '@') + regression test. 5 envfile tests, 187 suite, ruff clean.
Task 5: complete (commit e812562, review ✅/sonnet) — units.py render_unit/install_units + deploy/systemd/*.tmpl. Template dir from __file__ parents[3] (not app_dir); PATH deduped incl uv+autobio dirs (fixes Plan 10 footgun); api has migration ExecStartPre, scheduler doesn't; WantedBy=default.target. 3 tests, 190 suite, ruff clean. NOTE: old deploy/fold-*.service (system units) still present — removed in Task 16.
Task 6: complete (commits f85ed47..69f2b8b, review ✅/sonnet) — preflight.py Status/CheckResult + check_* (python/uv/docker/autobio/gpu/port/env/linger) + run_checks(context)/has_failures. autobio WARN(dev)/FAIL(deploy); gpu WARN-not-FAIL; linger only in deploy context; check_env sentinel matches main._DEV_SECRET_KEY. 5 tests, 195 suite, ruff clean.
Task 7: complete (commit 3552194, review ✅/sonnet) — postgres.py compose_up/wait_ready(bounded poll)/dump(gzip)/restore(subprocess stdin, not shell.run) + system_settings.set_maintenance_mode (append, reuses get_system_settings). Integration test RAN+passed (Postgres reachable). 199 suite, ruff clean. (Minor: non-dry-run subprocess paths untested per brief; inert noqa — recurring, see T1.)
Task 8: complete (commit 22759e7, review ✅/sonnet) — frontend.py build_frontend (docker build --target dist) + migrate (uv run alembic upgrade head), both cwd=app_dir, injectable runner. 2 tests, 201 suite. (Minor: build_frontend test uses weak assertion per brief; runner untyped — recurring.)
Task 9: complete (commit 355aee0, review ✅/sonnet, zero issues) — service.py (UNIT_NAMES/resolve_units/systemctl/is_active/journal-via-execvp) + run.py (serve→uvicorn.run main:app; scheduler→scheduler.main.main lazy import) + config.api_port=8000. 7 tests, 208 suite.
Task 10: complete (commit 2241eb4, review ✅/sonnet) — cli.py replaced (NO callback): doctor (Rich table, exit 1 on FAIL), version, config init/show, serve, scheduler. Module-ref imports (context/envfile/preflight) for monkeypatchability; lazy heavy imports verified (no fastapi/sqlalchemy/uvicorn at import). Resolved T1 help-text minor (help now matches brief; smoke test asserts a command name). 5 cli tests, 212 suite.
Task 11: complete (commit 7a8d8c0, review ✅/sonnet) — install.py deploy(first_run) converge (compose_up→wait_ready(raise if False)→migrate→build→install_units→enable→restart; first_run adds dirs+scaffold_env+linger note) + CLI install(preflight-gated, exit 1)/deploy. Module-ref imports for patchability; dry_run threaded. FIX: brief's `assert False` test rewritten to pytest.raises (ruff B011). 214 suite. (Minor: no CLI-level install/deploy tests.)
Task 12: complete (commit 2085a03, review ✅/sonnet, zero issues) — cli ops: status (Rich table: units via service.is_active + /health via _api_healthy + git ref), start/stop/restart, logs, and the SINGLE @app.callback(invoke_without_command=True)→status (guarded on invoked_subcommand is None). Cross-task callback note RESOLVED. 216 suite.
Task 13: complete (commits 6e504a6..e972ac5, review ✅/sonnet) — upgrade.py guarded upgrade/rollback/refresh + cli upgrade/refresh/rollback + db dump/restore. CRUX VERIFIED: health-gate failure raises + leaves maintenance ON (no finally clears it), in both upgrade & rollback (2 tests). _rotate_backups keeps 5. FIX (Important, plan self-contradiction): added --dry-run to db dump/restore (+2 tests; restore skips confirm on dry-run). 220 suite. NOTE: refresh calls `foldapp catalog sync` = forward-ref to T15.
Task 14: complete (commit 2486f9e, review ✅/sonnet) — cli dev up (compose_up+wait_ready+_run_dev_processes) + uninstall (stop/disable/unlink units, --purge deletes state_dir, confirm+--yes). Popen list-args, no shell=True; single callback intact (append-only). 2 tests, 222 suite.
Task 15: pending (BASE 2486f9e)

## Cross-task notes (controller must apply)
- Task 10 fully REPLACES cli.py (removing the empty `@app.callback` Task 1 added). After Task 10 there is NO callback. Task 12 adds exactly ONE `@app.callback(invoke_without_command=True)` (default → status). Tasks 11/12/13/14/15 APPEND commands to the Task-10 cli.py (don't rewrite it).

## Minor findings (for final whole-branch review triage)
- [Minor][T1] shell.py: `# noqa: S603` is inert (S rules not selected). Drop or replace with a plain comment. (Same pattern is copied into later tasks' subprocess calls.)
- [Minor][T1] cli.py help text set to "foldapp: fold@Scripps operator CLI …" to satisfy the smoke test (brief said just "fold@Scripps operator CLI …").
- [Minor][T1] shell.py cwd/env/capture=False paths untested (mechanically reviewed; exercised indirectly by later tasks).
- [Minor][T2] context._find_app_dir upward-walk + CWD fallback untested and unbounded (plan-mandated; at runtime systemd WorkingDirectory=app_dir or FOLDAPP_APP_DIR covers it).
- [Minor][T3] state.read_state doesn't guard malformed/corrupt JSON (raises instead of None). Relevant to Task 13 rollback path — corrupt state file would crash rather than fail gracefully.
- [Minor][T4] redact_settings typed Mapping[str, Any]/dict[str,Any] vs brief's Mapping[str, object]/dict[str, object]. Functionally fine; note for consistency.
- [Minor][T4] envfile.scaffold_env dry_run branch untested (exercised later via CLI config init).
- [Minor][T6] preflight tests cover only check_uv/check_autobio/has_failures (brief minimum); check_env/run_checks context-branch/gpu/port untested. Cheap follow-up; doctor CLI (T10) exercises run_checks end-to-end.
- [Minor][T6] check_docker/gpu/linger `runner=run` param untyped (plan-mandated; a Runner alias like Which would be consistent).
- [Minor][T11] no CLI-level (CliRunner) tests for install/deploy.
- [Minor][T13] no CLI-level tests for upgrade/refresh/rollback confirm-bypass; refresh forward-refs `foldapp catalog sync` (created in T15 — verify at end).
- [Minor][T14] uninstall's `service.systemctl("stop","all")` uses default check=True → aborts if units never installed (violates idempotency goal); consider check-tolerant stop/disable. Also `_run_dev_processes(paths)` param untyped.

## Final whole-branch review
(pending — dispatch on opus after Task 17)

input.prompt:
You are implementing Task 16: retire the Makefile + old system systemd units, and update the env example, for fold@Scripps.

## Task Description

Read your task brief FIRST — it is your requirements, with the exact commands and file content to use verbatim:
`/home/briney/git/fold-at-scripps/.superpowers/sdd/task-16-brief.md`

## Context

The `foldapp` operator CLI (Tasks 1–15) has replaced the old deployment story. This task removes the now-obsolete artifacts and updates the env-example to user-scoped defaults. This is ops-files-only — NO code, NO tests.

Steps (per brief):
1. `git rm Makefile deploy/fold-api.service deploy/fold-scheduler.service` (these are superseded by `foldapp` + the rendered user units in `deploy/systemd/*.tmpl`).
2. Replace the contents of `deploy/fold.env.example` with the user-scoped version in the brief (home-path defaults + `FOLD_API_PORT`).
3. Verify nothing still references the removed files: run `grep -rn "Makefile\|deploy/fold-api.service\|deploy/fold-scheduler.service\|make build-frontend\|make postgres\|make migrate" . --exclude-dir=.git --exclude-dir=.superpowers` — the only remaining matches should be in `docs/DEPLOYMENT.md` (rewritten next, in Task 17) and possibly `docs/superpowers/` plan/spec files. Report what you find; do NOT edit docs/ (that's Task 17).

## Global constraints

- Do not touch application code or tests. This is deploy/ + Makefile only.
- The env example must NOT contain a real secret (placeholder `CHANGE-ME-...` is fine — `foldapp config init` generates the real one).

## Before you begin

If anything is unclear or wrong, ASK. Otherwise proceed.

## Your job

Follow the brief's steps. Then run the full test suite once to confirm nothing broke (`uv run pytest` — should still pass; these are non-code changes) and `uv run ruff check .` (clean). Commit with the brief's commit message.

Work from: `/home/briney/git/fold-at-scripps`

## Report

Write your full report to `/home/briney/git/fold-at-scripps/.superpowers/sdd/task-16-report.md` (overwrite any stale content):
- files removed + the new env-example content
- the verification grep output (what still references removed files, and confirmation those are only docs/ handled by Task 17)
- full-suite + ruff results
- any concerns

Then reply with ONLY (under 15 lines):
- Status: DONE | DONE_WITH_CONCERNS | BLOCKED | NEEDS_CONTEXT
- Commits created (short SHA + subject)
- One-line summary (suite still green, grep clean except docs)
- Concerns, if any
- The report file path

If BLOCKED or NEEDS_CONTEXT, put specifics in your final message.
